sourceMovie.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty works as a adventure movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The adventure and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Secret Life of Walter Mitty clicked for you, The Book of Life (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Secret Life of Walter Mitty?
faq.answer: Try The Book of Life, A Minecraft Movie, Luck—each shares DNA with The Secret Life of Walter Mitty while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Secret Life of Walter Mitty?
faq.answer: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013) is best described as Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Secret Life of Walter Mitty worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this adventure lane.
